headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale for mid-cap solar manufacturing) at stake — Waaree Energies commissions 3-GW solar module plant in Gujarat, boosting renewable capacity
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is N/A.
No direct cost of capital impact; green financing eligibility may improve marginally.
BRSR, GRI, TCFD, EU Taxonomy frameworks triggered for disclosure, but no penalty or deadline pressure.
